review_gate_notes: Stage-2 (Codex) P2: parser accepted any string pubkey; a crafted member_admitted message would reach pubkeyToNpub and throw, breaking the timeline for receivers. REMEDIATED by lead: tightened the member_admitted guard to require /^[0-9a-f]{64}$/ (malformed content falls through to plain text). Added 7 parse-guard cases (incl. empty/short/long/uppercase/non-hex). Sibling guards (leave_intent/invite_cancelled) share the latent gap — left for a uniform follow-up (BACKLOG: display-only-chat-announcements-spoofable-share).

Stage-2 (Codex) P2: display-only announcement is spoofable by any member sending matching chat JSON. PRODUCT-OWNER-AUTHORIZED NON-ACTION (2026-07-19, 'ship as-is'): identical to every existing notice (group_renamed/leave_intent/invite_cancelled/polls); a spoof is cosmetic and cannot change authenticated membership/admin state, and the admitter is always the real protocol sender. Follow-up filed for uniform hardening.
